dry-run.description: Print plan without writing files, committing, or opening a PR.

prefer.description: On release/vX.Y.Z branch collision: 'ours' force-pushes; 'theirs' reuses the existing PR. Default refuses non-ff.

issue.description: Issue/PR number to post the terminal notice on. Auto-injected by dispatch.

goal.description: Managed goal id to report release PR evidence to.

success: release-prepare completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: release-prepare cannot return a valid canonical result
